# About This Learning Diary

This learning diary represents my journey in learning Remote Sensing throughout this course. At the beginning, many of the concepts and tools felt unfamiliar and challenging.However, through weekly practical sessions and continuous exploration, I gradually developed a better understanding of how remote sensing works, both theoretically and practically. Each week in this diary reflects what I have learned, the challenges I faced, and how I interpreted the results.This diary includes summaries, analyses, limitations, and reflections for each topic. It also highlights how remote sensing can be applied in real-world situations, such as environmental monitoring and urban planning. For me, this learning process is not only about understanding data, but also about developing critical thinking and analytical skills. I hope this diary reflects my progress and learning experience throughout the course.

Note: During the development of this learning diary, I encountered technical difficulties when pushing my work to GitHub. This was caused by unintentionally including raw data files in my work folder, which made the git push process very slow and initially unsuccessful.
